packageRules.description: Group non-major bumps together -- one MR to review instead of a dozen, still gated by the full pipeline (uv_audit, ruff, pytest).
Major bumps stay separate and reviewed individually -- these are the ones most likely to carry breaking changes.
Docker base image (python:3.14-bookworm in Dockerfile.multi) grouped on its own -- a base image bump is a different risk profile from a Python package bump and shouldn't block on / be blocked by it.
pre-commit hook revs (ruff, gitleaks) grouped separately -- these are local tooling pins, not app dependencies.
